title: Basti Totem
body:
This pack changes the texture of the totem of undying to a streamers Minecraft skin. I created this pack for myself but now it is done I want to share it with everyone.




### Basti Totem + Purple Flow PvP
![Basti Totem + Purple Flow PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZejuOYGo/images/907ed94e0a43a6b11085eebada85caf704cb5b03.png)
